title: About 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025, highest level since 2022: Fed
summary: Among those who used crypto for payments, over 25% said they did so because the business preferred crypto, citing speed, privacy and lower cost advantages.

title: Echo Protocol's eBTC exploited for $77M in admin key compromise
summary: The hacker has already laundered nearly 5% of the loot through Tornado Cash and is still holding the remaining 955 eBTC.

title: Oil Declines After Trump Says He Called Off Strike on Iran
summary: Oil fell after President Donald Trump said he’d called off a strike on Iran planned for Tuesday following an appeal by Persian Gulf allies.

title: SpaceX IPO Adds Second Musk Stock. Tesla Has a Problem
summary: For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors.

title: Lawyers Apologize After Fake Claude-Generated Quotes Appear in Trump Layoffs Case
summary: Attorneys representing a former Homeland Security official admitted using Anthropic’s Claude Console to help draft a court filing that included fabricated quotes.

title: AI Still Can't Beat the On-Call Engineer: Here's Why
summary: The best AI models can't yet beat the engineers they’re supposed to replace at fixing real-world problems, a new benchmark suggests.

title: Minnesota signs law allowing banks, credit unions to offer crypto custody services
summary: Governor Tim Walz has signed HF 3709 into law, permitting banks and credit unions to offer crypto custody services.

title: BTCFi protocol Echo exploited, targeting eBTC market on Monad: onchain analysts
summary: BTCFi protocol Echo was exploited, with the attacker minting 1,000 eBTC on Monad and using it as collateral to borrow WBTC.

title: Xi told Trump that Putin might ‘regret’ invasion of Ukraine
summary: US president also suggested they should co-operate with Russian leader against the International Criminal Court

title: Putin and Xi to discuss huge gas project at China summit
summary: Talks on Power of Siberia 2 pipeline come just days after Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing
